mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(STPLT_SEQ) FROM NMCP_STPLT_BAS WHERE 1=1 AND STPLT_CTG_CD = '06' AND SHOW_YN = 'Y' AND SITE_CODE = #{siteCode}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY STPLT_SEQ ASC) AS ROW_NUM , STPLT_SEQ , STPLT_TITLE , STPLT_CTG_CD , GET_CODE_NM('TERMS',STPLT_CTG_CD) AS STPLT_CTG_NM , TO_CHAR(CRET_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS CRET_DT FROM NMCP_STPLT_BAS WHERE 1=1 AND STPLT_CTG_CD = '06' AND SHOW_YN = 'Y' AND SITE_CODE = #{siteCode} ORDER BY STPLT_SEQ DESC

SELECT COUNT(A.STPLT_SEQ) FROM NMCP_STPLT_BAS A, NMCP_STPLT_DTL B WHERE A.STPLT_SEQ = B.STPLT_BAS_SEQ AND A.STPLT_CTG_CD NOT IN('06','05') AND SHOW_YN = 'Y'
AND A.STPLT_CTG_CD = #{stpltCtgCd}

SELECT STPLT_SEQ, STPLT_CTG_CD, STPLT_TITLE, SHOW_YN, STPLT_SBST, CRET_ID, AMD_ID, TO_CHAR(CRET_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS CRET_DT, TO_CHAR(AMD_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS AMD_DT, STPLT_HIT FROM NMCP_STPLT_BAS WHERE 1=1 AND STPLT_CTG_CD = '08' AND SHOW_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY STPLT_SEQ DESC

SELECT STPLT_SEQ, STPLT_CTG_CD, (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'TERMS' AND DTL_CD = STPLT_CTG_CD) AS STPLT_CTG_NM, STPLT_TITLE, SHOW_YN, STPLT_SBST, CRET_ID, AMD_ID, TO_CHAR(CRET_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS CRET_DT, TO_CHAR(AMD_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS AMD_DT, STPLT_HIT FROM NMCP_STPLT_BAS WHERE 1=1 AND STPLT_CTG_CD = '05' AND SHOW_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY STPLT_SEQ DESC
